source.title: Exchange identities and symmetric slices of the valley Delta conjecture

claim_boundary.proved: For the unique realizable area-two multiset m=0^(n-2)1^2 at n=6 and label alphabet bound M=5, every enumerated source-defined refined class has a generating polynomial symmetric under u<->v, at both the diagonal-blind and per-diagonal refinements.
claim_boundary.not_proved: The all-n, all-label-alphabet Conjecture 8.2; any unenumerated parameter range; the valley Delta conjecture itself.

fresh_independent_replay_2026-07-19.output: n=6 M=5 [diag-blind]: refined classes=143649, asymmetric=0; n=6 M=5 [per-diagonal]: refined classes=149388, asymmetric=0; RESULT: PASS

verification_routes.name: arXiv ancillary Python replay
verification_routes.command: python3 -c 'import sys; sys.path.insert(0, "anc/verification"); import area2; print(area2.run(6,5))'

public_source_search_note: A dated search found no prior public settlement of this exact n=6,M=5 finite extension. The source itself reports only the four smaller/previous ranges.
limitations: The positive result is exhaustive only for the exact bounded target.
The first DeepSeek handoff for this target was source-mismatched and was rejected; no provider reasoning was imported.
No public publication is authorized until the packet and clean-clone replay are assembled and the repository indexes are synchronized.
